name: Petjel Terong (Eggplant in Savory Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplants if desired and slice them crosswise into ½-inch thick slices. Arrange the slices in a shallow dish.
2. In a bowl, combine white vinegar, water, and salt until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture over the eggplant slices and let stand for one hour.
4. Remove the eggplant slices from the solution and pat dry with paper towels.
5. Heat oil in a wok to 375°F (190°C) until very hot.
6. Deep-fry the eggplant slices, a few at a time, until light brown. Use a slotted spoon to remove them and drain on paper towels.
7. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients for the sauce: peanut butter, coconut milk, remaining white vinegar, salt, and water. Bring to a gentle boil and simmer, stirring frequently, until the sauce thickens slightly.
8. Arrange the fried eggplant slices in a shallow dish and pour the sauce over them.
